Localization.Description: A default document template was changed. Microsoft Office applications contain templates that are used to customize styles. Basic templates are used every time a user starts an Office application.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The value of the registry parameter "{object.name}," which is responsible for the location of a default Microsoft Office template, was changed to "{object.new_value}" on host {event_src.host}
Default Microsoft Office document template "{object.name}" was changed on host {event_src.host}
